features: 【Premium Quality】: Our bobby pins for thick hair are made of high-quality metal which remains shining even after a prolonged period of use. The material does not break easily with strong and durable properties. Can be used multiple times and is worth the money.

【Package Deal】: The package includes 150 pcs brown hair gripswith a clear storage box,enough for your spare and replacement in daily.It is convenient for you to store and carry when you go out for work or traveling.

【Comfortable & Easy to Use】: These small kirby grips have a round tip on their ends and can be easily carried while on the job or traveling in a portable box. A smooth body surface helps protect your hair from getting scratched, but still tight enough to not fall off.

【Sleek Design】: These hair pins for women have a metallic finish that will naturally blend with hair's highlights, giving you a beautiful and elegant appearance. The brown bobby pins are wave shape in design and the non-slip grip holds your hair all day long. Compatible with various complex hairstyles.

【Wide Usage】:The hair grips fit for most people and all types of hair,suitable for daily wearings and many occasions, such as parties, meetings,wedding and so on, can be applied to diy your hairstyle by yourself at home,like up-dos, buns, etc.
description: Product Description OWill Bobby Pins ·150 count pack of OWill Bobby Pins. Available in a variety of colors to perfectly match your hair. ·Epoxy-dipped comfort tips to minimize pokes. ·An every day must-have. Securely holds hair in all applications. ·Perfect product for hair stylists to have on hand for all client hair colors! Every day essential bobby pins. Securely and comfortably hold hair in place. Available in a variety of colors to match your hair, whether your hair is black, brown or blonde! Curls Dish up Straight hair Specification： Hair pin size: 5cm/ 1.97 inches in length Box size: 9 x 6 x 2cm/ 3.54 x 2.36x 0.79 inches Pin color: black&blonde&brown Box color: clear Pin material: metal Box material: plastic Quantity：50 x black hair pins & 50 x blonde hair pins & 50 x brown hair pins Process material upgrading Not easy to break,tighter Ball end design Epoxy-dipped comfort tips to minimize pokes. Wavy root design Prevent slippage,not easy to slip off. Daily Use Share with family Best gift
